description: Move the browser tools update indicator dot from the Chrome icon to the menu button, matching the plugin card pattern.

userStories.title: Move update dot from BrowserToolsCard icon to BrowserToolsMenu trigger button
userStories.description: The browser tools card shows the update indicator (yellow dot) on the Chrome icon, while plugin cards show it on the ... menu button. Move the dot to the menu trigger button for visual consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: BrowserToolsCard.tsx no longer renders a dot overlay on the PluginIcon when serverUpdate is defined
BrowserToolsMenu trigger button has position relative and renders the identical dot element when serverUpdate is defined
The dot element in BrowserToolsMenu uses the exact same classes as PluginMenu: absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 h-2 w-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-primary
userStories.notes:
Files:
- platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/BrowserToolsCard.tsx (remove the dot overlay)
- platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/BrowserToolsMenu.tsx (add the dot to the trigger button)

Context:
The PluginMenu component (platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginMenu.tsx) has the correct pattern. The BrowserToolsMenu should match it exactly.

Changes:

1. In BrowserToolsCard.tsx, remove this block (currently inside the `<div className="relative">` wrapper around PluginIcon):
```tsx
{serverUpdate && (
  <div className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 h-2 w-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-primary" />
)}
```
Also remove the `<div className="relative">` wrapper around PluginIcon since it's no longer needed — just render PluginIcon directly.

2. In BrowserToolsMenu.tsx, update the trigger button to match PluginMenu's pattern. Change:
```tsx
<button
  type="button"
  className="flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded hover:bg-muted/50"
  aria-label="Browser tools options">
  <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
</button>
```
To:
```tsx
<button
  type="button"
  className="relative flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded hover:bg-muted/50"
  aria-label="Browser tools options">
  <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  {serverUpdate && (
    <div className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 h-2 w-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-primary" />
  )}
</button>
```

Reference — this is the PluginMenu trigger (lines 77-85 of PluginMenu.tsx):
```tsx
<button
  type="button"
  className="relative flex h-6 w-6 items-center justify-center rounded hover:bg-muted/50"
  aria-label="Plugin options">
  <MoreHorizontal className={`h-4 w-4 ${muted ? 'text-muted-foreground' : ''}`} />
  {plugin.update && (
    <div className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 h-2 w-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-primary" />
  )}
</button>
```

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the BrowserToolsMenu props — serverUpdate is already passed as a prop
- Do NOT change the PluginMenu — it already has the correct pattern
- Do NOT change the menu content items (the 'Update to v...' menu item) — only the trigger button dot changes
- The aria-label should remain 'Browser tools options' (not 'Plugin options')
